# manager.models.forecaster_recursive_xgb { #spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_xgb }

`manager.models.forecaster_recursive_xgb`

Recursive forecaster model wrappers for different estimators.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [ForecasterRecursiveXGB](#spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_xgb.ForecasterRecursiveXGB) | ForecasterRecursive specialization using XGBoost. |

### ForecasterRecursiveXGB { #spotforecast2_safe.manager.models.forecaster_recursive_xgb.ForecasterRecursiveXGB }

```python
manager.models.forecaster_recursive_xgb.ForecasterRecursiveXGB(
    iteration,
    lags=12,
    **kwargs,
)
```

ForecasterRecursive specialization using XGBoost.

#### Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}
